calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of ONE Minor.
Dept. 514, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. WILLIS-MCGHEE, CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235

Petitioner SHUBI LIN & ZHIMING ZHOU was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor XIAO LAN ZHOU
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to ANINA YONGPEI LIN.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Young Pei Lin was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the Minor Xiaolan Zhau.
Stella Li was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner. Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with the proposed name change to a misprint in the proof of publication. Accordingly, the matter is taken OFF CALENDAR by Order of the Court. Petitioner was instructed to seek assitance at the Access Center.
